Who We Are

BUILT ON CRAFTSMANSHIP & TRUST

At DoneRight Home Remodeling LLC, we believe your home should be a sanctuary of quality and style. For over 10 years, we've specialized in premium remodeling — blending artisan craftsmanship with a sophisticated eye for design.

We are committed to perfection, ensuring every project reflects our dedication to excellence and professional standards. From the first consultation to the final walkthrough, we treat your home like it's our own.

Start Your Project
What We Do

OUR
SERVICES

From a single room upgrade to a whole-home transformation — we bring the same care and precision to every project.

01
Premium Kitchen Renovations

Custom cabinetry, countertops, backsplashes, islands, and full kitchen overhauls that blend style with function.

Learn More →
02
Master Bathroom Remodeling

Walk-in showers, soaking tubs, tile work, vanities, and spa-level finishes that make your bathroom a true retreat.

Learn More →
03
Full Home Transformations

Whole-home renovations including open floor plans, room additions, and complete interior redesigns.

Learn More →
04
Custom Millwork & Cabinetry

Built-ins, crown molding, trim work, custom shelving, and accent walls crafted to elevate every room.

Learn More →
05
Exterior Modernization

Siding, painting, decks, patios, and curb appeal upgrades that make your home stand out on the block.

Learn More →

How It Works

OUR PROCESS

1

Free Consultation

Tell us your vision. We come to you for a free on-site estimate — no pressure, no obligation.

2

Detailed Quote

You receive a transparent proposal with exact pricing, materials, and a realistic timeline.

3

We Get to Work

Our crew shows up on time, keeps the site clean, and communicates with you every step.

4

DoneRight

Final walkthrough together. We don't consider it done until you love every inch of it.
